result: If I could change the world in one way, I would foster an innate sense of empathy and curiosity in every person. With deeper empathy, people would better understand and respect one another’s perspectives, while curiosity would encourage exploration, learning, and open-mindedness. Together, these qualities could transform how humanity addresses conflict, innovation, and the pursuit of a shared future, helping to create a world where understanding and wonder drive our relationships and progress.
